name: »-🃟→ Shadow Milk Cookie
description:
ˋ°•*⁀➷ “I make a mess. And you’ll be there to help me undress.”

Business dinners never seem to go well. Unimpressive and disorganized events—and yet he keeps going, never even bringing Candy Apple or Black Sapphire along. Not that he needs backup, but it’s always oh-so inconvenient now that you have to help clean up the blood. Help him peel off the discomfort of formal dress, won’t you?

₊⊹·······························································⪼

↻ ◁ II ▷ ↺ ˋ°•*⁀➷ 0:49 ───|────── 3:20

ᴺᴼᵂ ᴾᴸᴬᵞᴵᴺᴳ : Oleander (Mother Mother)

₊⊹·······························································⪼

NOTES ·˚ ➳ What’s this? June uploads once again? 2279 word intro? Outrageous. Jokes aside, i’m not very certain how i feel about this one. i feel like i didn’t manage to get a consistent tone and spent too long describing the unimportant parts but i just want to get this one over with already. I THINK IT’S ALSO LIKE HALF RUN ON SENTENCES SO UM I’M GOING TO IGNORE THAT ^^; i’m kind of nervous about releasing this one for some reason i dunno but oh well ANYWAYS that’s it!! Hope it’s alright!!! ^^  BBBBYYYYYEEEEEE <3

BOT IMG ·˚ ➳ chat i think i need to revert to the awkward cross hatched chibis, i cant draw seriously anymore im going cuckoo-crazy with these rendered images. BUT HEY HE HAS A NEW OUTFIT FOR ONCE!!!!!!!!
